title: Silky Spicy Fermented Pepper Stir-fry
description: A fresh and silky one-pot Australian dish featuring fermented peppers for a unique twist on traditional stir-fries, suitable for diabetics.

ingredients.name: Shallots
ingredients.notes: Finely chopped for sweetness and umami

ingredients.name: Fresh Ginger
ingredients.notes: Grated for its natural sugars and zestiness

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: To enhance the acidity and balance flavors

ingredients.name: Red Chili Peppers (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a touch of heat, finely chopped or crushed

ingredients.name: Water Chestnuts (optional)
ingredients.notes: Cut into thin slices for crunch and texture

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic, shallots, and grated ginger. Sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Fold in the fermented red peppers. Stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
If using chili peppers and water chestnuts, add them now and stir well to combine.
Pour in soy sauce and lemon juice. Mix thoroughly and let it simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes until slightly thickened.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course accompaniment.
